data.name: severity.info
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity label for informational tenant-admin status. Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.warning
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity label for warnings on tenant-profile drift, user-membership conflicts, or pending bundle changes. Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.error
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity label for blocking failures (tenant persistence, user role assignment). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.critical
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity label for critical tenant incidents (data-isolation breach risk, root-admin lockout). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: action.save
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Action verb on the tenant-profile / settings submit button. Imperative; sentence case. Block-scoped pilot string for cascade verification.

data.name: action.cancel
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Action verb on dismiss/abort buttons in tenant-admin dialogs. Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: action.retry
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Action verb on retry button after a failed tenant operation. Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: state.loading
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Empty-state placeholder shown while tenant data is being fetched. Trailing horizontal ellipsis (U+2026).
